name: Kathee's Kookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the melted butter into the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch pan.
2. Sprinkle the crumbs evenly over the melted butter.
3. Sprinkle the walnuts over the crumbs.
4. Sprinkle the chocolate pieces over the walnuts.
5. Sprinkle the flaked coconut over the chocolate pieces.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the evaporated milk with the brown sugar until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture evenly over the layers in the pan.
8. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 25 minutes.
9. Allow to cool for one hour.
10. Cut into 48 squares (1-1/2 x 1-1/2 inches).
